atlas_caveat: the Wave-A atlas FAILED its Stage-2 coverage gates (routing-mass 0.825<0.95, held-out Spearman 0.63<0.8); its label_class field is used ONLY as an unvalidated ranking heuristic inside the SEM-D tier-2 extension, which the experiment itself prices (see registry record glm-s4drop-0, ASM-2388)
purpose: Byte-frozen copies of the two committed selection-side inputs the glm-s4drop-0 mask builder (poc/glm52-probe/stage4/build_masks.py) consumes: the Stage-3 causal analysis (16-cell skiplist + per-cell labels) and the Wave-A atlas per-cell index (label_class used by the SEM-D tier-2 ranking). Copied 2026-07-16 from their committed source paths; byte-identity to source is re-verified at bring-up (fail closed).
